request_text: List a user's active sessions and end a selected one
rationale: Session management is included by Clause 3.1.

request_text: Enforce the three-session limit when a user signs in on another device
rationale: Clause 3.1 includes session management and states at most 3 concurrent sessions per user are supported.

request_text: When someone locks themselves out, let them get back in on their own
rationale: Paraphrase of password reset, included by Clause 3.1.

request_text: A pie chart on the management screen showing deals by stage
rationale: Paraphrase of standard chart/widget components on the dashboard, included by Clause 4.3.

request_text: Send push notifications when a deal changes owner
Let staff sign in with the account they already use at the office
rationale: Paraphrase of SSO / third-party identity provider login, excluded by Clause 7.1.

request_text: Keep users logged in when they switch to the phone app
rationale: Reads like session management (Clause 3.1) but presupposes a mobile application, which Clause 7.1 excludes.

request_text: Schedule reports to be emailed automatically every Monday
rationale: Near the reporting clause (4.2.1) but scheduled generation and email delivery are capabilities the contract never grants.

request_text: Raise the concurrent session cap to 10 per user
rationale: Clause 3.1 supports at most 3 concurrent sessions per user; 10 exceeds the contractual limit.

request_text: Wire the invoicing service into Meridian as an integration
rationale: External system integration falls under Clause 5.1, whose 24-hour effort pool is consumed by the logged work items.

request_text: The password reset email never arrives since the last deploy
rationale: Defect report against delivered functionality; bug-fix maintenance is in scope per Clause 8.1. Deliberately shares vocabulary with Clause 3.1.

request_text: Panoya yeni bir grafik bileşeni ekleyelim
rationale: Turkish request against the English contract; chart components on the dashboard are included by Clause 4.3.
